forest-d2.title: The Blackness Between Trees
text: So dark here the trees disappear into nothing.
The fog is thicker. Your footsteps make no sound.
There is a stone marker half-sunk in the ground.
You are not sure this place wants you here.

marker.text: A flat stone driven into the earth. One side is smooth — intentionally so. Whatever was carved here has been scraped clean.

fog.text: You reach into it. Your hand disappears. For a moment you feel something reach back.

silence.text: Not just quiet. Wrong. Like something removed the sound on purpose.
